series_metadata.series_description: An index of the case number, permit applicant statistics, permit type applied for, and number if appeal is from a renewal denial, and reason for appeal, and a chronological record of the case.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals of all cases listed on the Docket, whichever occurs last, and then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
